title: Drevin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Drevin''' was a company that produced a standard-sized anti-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] pools. One of their pools was installed at the [[Holiday Towers Hotel and Casino|Holiday Towers]] [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-04-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''
*<!-- 1995-XX-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]]
